[gMASK]<sop><|user|>
user message<|assistant|>
<think></think>
assistant message<|user|>
<|assistant|>
<think>reasoning message 2</think>
assistant message 2
<tool_call>function_name
<arg_key>argument</arg_key>
<arg_value>value</arg_value>
</tool_call><|observation|>
<tool_response>
tool call result
</tool_response><|assistant|>
